title: Taoping wins $3M+ orders via subsidiary to boost elevator business
content:
* Taoping (TAOP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TAOP]) secured over $3M in new smart elevator orders via its subsidiary Skyladder (Tianjin) Technology Development to support elevator deployment, upgrades, and maintenance services.
 	* Backed by this momentum, the company terminated its Oct 17, 2025, non-binding LOI to acquire Alphalion Holdings, prioritizing higher-return opportunities within its core elevator business.
 	* Stock is slightly trading lower at $1.25.
 	* Source: Press Release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20465922-taoping-expands-smart-elevator-services-business-with-new-orders-exceeding-us-3-million]
